name: music_library_selection
expected: Audio players display original and infused songs; spectrographs shown.
stdin: select Artist – Song Title from Music Library
expected_stdout: Audio players display original and infused songs; spectrographs shown.

name: upload_mp3_file
expected: Audio players display original and infused songs; spectrographs shown.
expected_stdout: Audio players display original and infused songs; spectrographs shown.

name: empty_music_library_selection
expected: Error message: 'No songs available in the library.'
expected_stdout: Error message: 'No songs available in the library.'

name: invalid_mp3_upload
expected: Error message: 'Invalid file type. Please upload an MP3 file.'
expected_stdout: Error message: 'Invalid file type. Please upload an MP3 file.'

name: apply_overlay_no_selection
expected: Error message: 'Please select a song or upload an MP3 file.'
stdin: click 'Apply Overlay' without selecting a song or uploading a file
expected_stdout: Error message: 'Please select a song or upload an MP3 file.'

name: large_mp3_file_upload
expected: Processing message displayed; audio players and spectrographs shown after processing.
expected_stdout: Processing message displayed; audio players and spectrographs shown after processing.

name: apply_overlay_on_processed_song
expected: Audio players display original and infused songs; spectrographs shown.
stdin: select a song already infused and click 'Apply Overlay'
expected_stdout: Audio players display original and infused songs; spectrographs shown.

name: view_overlay_data
expected: Spectrographs A and B displayed; metrics slide shown.
expected_stdout: Spectrographs A and B displayed; metrics slide shown.
